lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: Hello there! Welcome to my special antiques boutique.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: I'm a specialist at identifying rare and antique weapons, specifically swords, but I plan to branch out. If you have any old and rusty weapons that you want me to check out, just show them to me, pay me 100 Gold and

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: I'll see if you have an antique on your hands.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: I can also repair some antique weapons and armours, just show me the item and I'll let you know if I can repair it and for how much.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's involved?

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: Well, pay me 100 Gold and I'll see if any rusty swords that you've found are actually worth anything. Some of them might be worth some money! If it's an antique item though, I reserve the right to purchase it

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: immediately for adding to my own personal collection. I'll give you fair price for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I get from this?

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: If I can reclaim the sword with my own specialist skills, I'll return it to you in peak condition. If it's an antique, I'll just give you what I think it's worth and I generally pay quite well. However, if it's just a piece of junk, I'll

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: simply give you the bad news and get rid of the item for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll give it a go!

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: Sorry my friend, but you don't seem to have any swords that need to be identified.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: Sorry my friend, but you don't seem to have enough money to cover my fee!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

sections.title: Using a Rusty sword on Tindel Marchant

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a bronze sword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a bronze long sword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be an iron sword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a long sword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a steel sword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a steel long sword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a black sword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a black longsword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a mithril sword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a mithril long sword.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: Sorry my friend, but the item wasn't worth anything. I've disposed of it for you.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: Wow! The item you gave me was a very rare antique...no real use...but hey, it's worth some money!

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: That's a fair price for the item! I'll add it to my collection!

sections.title: Using a rusty scimitar on Tindel Marchant

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a bronze scimitar.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be an iron scimitar.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a steel scimitar.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a black scimitar.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a mithril scimitar.

lines.speaker: Tindel Marchant
lines.text: Sorry my friend, but the item wasn't worth anything. I've disposed of it for you.
